name: Jammy Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whole Grain Bran Muffin Mix (Arrowhead Mills)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Whole Grain Bran Muffin Mix according to package directions.
2. Before baking, spoon 1 teaspoon apple butter (or your favorite flavor) into the center of each unbaked muffin.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25-30 minutes.
